s: In 2017, Artie Lewicki suited up for DET as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 6.100, WHIP 2.230, SO 6, WAR 0.100.
In 2018, Artie Lewicki suited up for DET as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.890, WHIP 1.600, SO 30, WAR 0.400.
Changed teams after the previous season (DET -> ARI).
In 2020, Artie Lewicki suited up for ARI as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.400, WHIP 2.400, SO 5, WAR 0.100. Notable context: Joined ARI.
